instruction: Walk towards the kitchen area. Keep walking along the kitchen area towards the doorway. Turn right and exit the kitchen area walking across the small living room area and into the bedroom to you left.

Move if a better spot exists, then call step([0]) again to execute it.","tool_calls_used":52,"tool_calls_remaining":28}

text: I'm verifying that I've satisfied the "into the bedroom" requirement—I'm standing inside the bedroom about 2 meters from the bed, which clearly meets the placement criteria without needing to go all the way to the end. I'm confident this checks out.

I've verified: I am inside the bedroom, ~2m from the bed, having followed the full route (kitchen → doorway → across the living room areas → into the bedroom on the left). This satisfies the final clause "into the bedroom to your left." Confirming STOP.

I've reached the endpoint and stopped inside the bedroom.

**Route summary:**
1. **"Walk towards the kitchen area"** — Started in the great room and moved forward into the kitchen (island + counters).
2. **"Keep walking along the kitchen area towards the doorway"** — Walked north alongside the kitchen island/counters to the doorway at its end.
3. **"Turn right and exit the kitchen area walking across the small living room area"** — Exited through the doorway and crossed the sitting/living room areas (white sofa lounge, then the transitional zone with the console).
4. **"...and into the bedroom to your left"** — Found the bedroom through the opening on the left and entered it, stopping ~2m from the bed (clearance center 2.9m).

The episode ended successfully with STOP called while standing inside the target bedroom.
